summary: Build a realistic 3D racing experience featuring a car that visually matches the user-provided reference image, placed in a similarly realistic racing scene, with the car being drivable by the player.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Realistic sports coupe livery/texture: yellow body with a rear rainbow gradient band (sports-coupe-livery.dim_2048x1024.png)
- Asphalt road texture with subtle wear and variation (asphalt-realistic.dim_2048x2048.png)
- Grass ground texture suitable for trackside verges (grass-verge.dim_2048x2048.png)
- Trackside barrier/guardrail texture (guardrail-texture.dim_2048x512.png)
- Red/white curb texture (curb-red-white-realistic.dim_2048x256.png)

existing_features.title: Update the in-race player car visual model in the 3D race scene to look realistically like the uploaded reference screenshot: a modern wide-body sports coupe seen from the rear, primarily yellow bodywork, with a rainbow/gradient accent across the rear and a prominent rear spoiler, rendered with more realistic materials (paint + glass + rubber) than the current boxy placeholder car.

Make the racing environment/track look more realistic and closer in look-and-feel to the uploaded screenshot: a road course with asphalt, grass verges, red/white curbs, guardrails/barriers, and trackside scenery, with lighting/fog tuned for realism.

Ensure the player can drive the car (player-controlled drivable gameplay) in the realistic scene with responsive controls, including acceleration/brake and steering, and with a stable third-person chase camera similar to the reference perspective (behind-the-car view).

Add a simple HUD overlay inspired by the reference screenshot that shows at minimum: current lap/total laps and current speed readout, in a clean, readable style that does not block the center of the screen.
Add any new required static art assets (textures/decals) as generated images under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend car/track rendering.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a realistic 3D car model that visually matches the provided reference image (shape/style/color).
Create a realistic racing scene/environment that matches the reference screenshot’s look and feel.
Implement player-controlled drivable car gameplay (driving controls and vehicle movement).

projectName: Realistic drivable car + realistic track scene matching the reference screenshot
